query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: Swirling ribbons of colored light against a solid black background. A curved streak of cyan light arcs along the left edge. In the center, a domed form glows with warm amber and golden tones, its surface showing fine linear striations. To the right, overlapping arcs of magenta and red light sweep upward, with a core of bright yellow-orange concentrated near the base. The light forms overlap and interweave without depicting any recognizable objects or figures.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Swirling ribbons of motion-blurred colored light in cyan, amber, magenta, and red sweep across an entirely black background, the forms created through long-exposure or camera movement that renders them as soft, sweeping streaks without hard edges. The saturated hues clash against each other in aggressive neon-like juxtaposition. No identifiable subject emerges from the abstraction; the image functions purely through color, gesture, and luminous blur.
